list.noTargetProjects: No projects deployed to this target yet.
list.noTargetDesc: Deploy an app to this target, or create a new project to get started.

serverCta.title: Deploy to your own server
serverCta.description: Connect a server over SSH to run projects on your own infrastructure alongside Openship Cloud.

delete.orphanCleanup: Project deleted. {count} remote resource(s) will be cleaned up when the server is reachable.
delete.partialCleanup: Project deleted, but {count} cleanup step(s) failed. Ops will need to verify.
delete.hasActiveWork: Project has active work — try again in a moment
delete.deletionInProgress: Another delete is already running for this project
delete.confirmForceOrphan: Some resources couldn't be removed from the server. Delete the project anyway and clean them up automatically later?
delete.teardownFailedAt: Teardown failed at: {reasons}. Retry, or force-delete to orphan them.

notFound.title: Project Not Found
notFound.subtitle: We couldn't locate this project
notFound.reasonDeleted: The project may have been deleted
notFound.reasonAccess: You may not have access to this project
notFound.reasonUrl: The domain URL might be incorrect

draft.subtextDraft: This project hasn't been deployed yet. Deploy it to get a live URL, logs, and analytics.
draft.subtextOther: This project has no live deployment yet. Review the source and try again.
draft.detailsDescription: What this project deploys and where
draft.attemptsDescription: Every build for this project — click one to open it
draft.connectLink: Connect a repository or local path
draft.managedImagesText: This app runs from prebuilt images — there's no repository to connect. Just deploy.
draft.deleteDescription: Remove this project — can't be undone

monitoring.noDataDescription: Analytics will appear here after the deployed app starts receiving traffic.

services.chooseService: Choose one to open its full settings screen.
services.emptyDescription: Add a database, cache, or any container image to run alongside your project. Pick from the catalog or paste any Docker image.
services.driftDescription: The repo's docker-compose changed values you had edited here. Your edits are still live — for each, keep yours or take the repo's.
services.toastSavedDeploy: {name} saved - deploy the project to start it

routingRetry.title: Free domain routing needs attention
routingRetry.description: The app is live on the server, but its free .opsh.io URL didn't route through Openship Cloud's edge. Retry once the server is reachable from the cloud on port 80.
routingRetry.failed: Couldn't sync the free domain routing.

redeploy.deployStartedLong: Deploy started — taking longer than usual, opening deployments.
redeploy.couldNotRefresh: Could not refresh the deployment. Check the deployment log for details.
redeploy.couldNotRedeploy: Could not start redeployment. Check the deployment log for details.
redeploy.actionRequiredDescription: This project's latest release deployed with failed services and is waiting for you to keep or reject it.
redeploy.deployLatestMulti: Pulls the latest commit and rebuilds only the services whose files changed since the last deploy.
redeploy.deployLatestSingle: Pulls the latest commit and redeploys using the current configuration.
redeploy.noPublicDomainDescOne: This project has {count} service with exposed ports, but none are configured with a reachable domain. If you deploy now, the stack can run internally, but users will not be able to access it from a public URL.
redeploy.noPublicDomainDescOther: This project has {count} services with exposed ports, but none are configured with a reachable domain. If you deploy now, the stack can run internally, but users will not be able to access it from a public URL.
redeploy.fixStep2: Pick the service that should be public.
redeploy.fixStep3: Enable domain exposure and choose the public port.
